fields.summary: Specifies a design-space coordinate along a single variation axis of a variable font.
fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate` pairs a variation axis tag with a design-space
value to position a variable font along that axis. Arrays of this struct are used by
<xref:SkiaSharp.SKFontArguments.VariationDesignPosition> and returned by
<xref:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface.VariationDesignPosition>.

This type is a value type and does not require disposal.

## Examples

```csharp
// Select weight 700 on a variable font
var coord = new SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate
{
    Axis = new SKFourByteTag('w', 'g', 'h', 't'),
    Value = 700f,
};
```
]]></format>

fields.summary: Gets or sets the four-byte tag that identifies the variation axis.
fields.value: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag" /> identifying the axis to position (for example, <c>'w','g','h','t'</c> for weight).

fields.summary: Indicates whether this instance is equal to the specified <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate" />.
fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if both the axis and value are equal; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

params.obj: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate" /> to compare with this instance.

fields.summary: Indicates whether this instance is equal to the specified object.
fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if <paramref name="obj" /> is an <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate" /> with the same axis and value; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

params.obj: The object to compare with this instance.

entries.signature: public override readonly bool Equals (object obj);

fields.summary: Returns the hash code for this instance.
fields.returns: A hash code for the current <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate" />.

fields.summary: Determines whether two <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate" /> values are equal.
fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if <paramref name="left" /> and <paramref name="right" /> have equal axis and value; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

entries.signature: public static bool operator == (SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate left, SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate right);

fields.summary: Determines whether two <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate" /> values are not equal.
fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if <paramref name="left" /> and <paramref name="right" /> differ; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

entries.signature: public static bool operator != (SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate left, SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate right);

fields.summary: Gets or sets the design-space coordinate along the specified variation axis.
fields.value: The target value for the axis identified by <see cref="P:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate.Axis" />.
